base_prompt: single character sprite, pixel art mech, 16-bit retro game sprite, isometric 3/4 top-down view, {mech_type}, {color_scheme}, simple chunky design, solid black background, centered, one character only, into the breach game style, tactical mech game asset, magitech military robot
negative_prompt: multiple characters, turnaround sheet, reference sheet, model sheet, front and back, several views, collage, blurry, smooth, 3d render, realistic, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, text, watermark, signature, dithering, complex details, large image, full body portrait, background scenery, landscape

defaults.color_scheme: dark gunmetal gray with purple-blue energy accents and glowing visor

variants.mech_type: aggressive medium-weight bipedal melee mech, pile bunker on right arm, blade weapon on left arm, angular sharp armor plates, combat stance leaning forward
variants.color_scheme: dark gunmetal gray body with purple-blue energy lines and glowing visor, red accent on blade

variants.mech_type: sleek ranged bipedal mech, long rifle on right arm, sensor visor on head, light armor with targeting equipment, steady aiming stance
variants.color_scheme: dark blue-gray body with green targeting laser glow, white sensor accents

variants.mech_type: stocky wide bipedal mech, twin shoulder-mounted cannons, heavy barrel arms, wide stance artillery pose
variants.color_scheme: dark red-brown body with orange heat vents glowing, brass barrel accents

variants.mech_type: bulky heavy bipedal mech, large tower shield on left arm, thick armor plates everywhere, defensive crouching pose
variants.color_scheme: heavy blue-gray armor with cyan energy shield glow, white plate accents

variants.mech_type: medium bipedal support mech, repair arm with tool attachments, antenna dish on back, medical cross marking
variants.color_scheme: white and pale green body with soft green healing glow, clean minimal markings

variants.mech_type: thin angular bipedal mech, electronic warfare antennae array on head, sparking disruption emitters on arms, hunched sneaky pose
variants.color_scheme: dark purple-black body with yellow electric sparks, jagged angular design

variants.mech_type: lightweight bipedal support mech, energy projector arms, backpack generator unit, hovering upright pose
variants.color_scheme: silver-white body with golden energy accents, glowing power conduits

variants.mech_type: sleek ninja-like bipedal stealth mech, twin daggers, slim profile, active camouflage panels, agile crouching pose
variants.color_scheme: matte black body with faint teal edge glow, minimal silhouette, stealthy

variants.mech_type: massive heavy bipedal tank mech, extremely thick armor, built-in arm cannon, immovable wide stance
variants.color_scheme: dark olive and steel body with orange reactor glow, battle-scarred heavy plates

variants.mech_type: unstable-looking bipedal mech, cracked glowing core visible in chest, overheating vents, energy arcing from body, dangerous stance
variants.color_scheme: charred dark body with bright red-orange magma cracks, volatile energy leaking
